notes: Could not get game to load at all.
title: America's Army: Proving Grounds

notes: I only ran a few maps, around an hour of play time, but PB installed, I didn't get kicked and the game ran flawlessly. Download, Install and Play!
title: America's Army: Proving Grounds

notes: There are some shader issues that show up in the game (black spots appearing and weird noise,) which can be mostly fixed by changing the anti-aliasing from none to a higher option, and then back to none. Works fine besides that, though.
title: America's Army: Proving Grounds

notes: Some glitches on screen. You can change resolution, change some parameters on graphics, but glitchs always appear-
title: America's Army: Proving Grounds

notes: It plays from start but there are many texture issues that I could not fix by any configuration in game, removing anti-aliasing reduces the issues but doesn't solve it, when trying to run with D9VK the game starts but locks after the menu screen, disabling Esync doesn't seem to change anything. Sort of playable but very uncomfortable.
title: America's Army: Proving Grounds

notes: Had to back off some of the video settings in game but ran perfectly otherwise. Played on several different servers and maps and had no issues. I don't have mic so didn't try in game voip. Turn of the steam overlay shortcut key for Lshift or you won't be able to run.
title: America's Army: Proving Grounds
